message:
Command `# The resolved.json is NOT being updated - librelane is still reading old paths!
# It's reading from a DIFFERENT resolved.json or re-resolving from somewhere.
# Let's check - maybe --last-run creates a NEW resolved.json by re-processing config.json
# and ignoring the one we patched.
# The --last-run flag reads the run tag from the symlink 'latest'
ls -la /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/ | head -5
echo "---check if latest symlink exists---"
ls -la /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/latest 2>/dev/null || echo "No latest symlink"` executed with exit code 0.
